# 获取视频号标题

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/wxvideo:
    post:
      summary: 获取视频号标题
      deprecated: false
      description: |
        | 字段 |说明  |
        | --- | --- |
        code = 0  |调用成功
        20001    |金额不足
        -2     |视频无法播放
        50000    |服务器内部错误

        | 字段 |说明  |
        | --- | --- |
        |v2_name| 视频号唯一id 可用于获取视频号历史记录 |
        |nickname|视频号昵称|
        |title|视频的标题|
        |media_type | 视频类型|
        |cost            |花费|
        |remain_money    |余额|
      tags:
        - 视频号接口
      parameters: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                object_id:
                  description: 视频唯一id 例如 ：14462543356698040491
                  example: '14462543356698040491'
                  type: string
                object_nonce_id:
                  description: 该参数不填也可以，建议填上
                  example: ''
                  type: string
                key:
                  description: 极致了key （0.2/次）
                  example: '{{key}}'
                  type: string
                verifycode:
                  description: 如果设置了需要填写
                  example: ''
                  type: string
                type:
                  description: type=13
                  example: '13'
                  type: string
              required:
                - object_id
                - key
                - type
            examples: {}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  code:
                    type: integer
                  nickname:
                    type: string
                  username:
                    type: string
                  title:
                    type: string
                  media_type:
                    type: integer
                  cost:
                    type: number
                  remain_money:
                    type: number
                required:
                  - code
                  - nickname
                  - username
                  - title
                  - media_type
                  - cost
                  - remain_money
                x-apifox-orders:
                  - code
                  - nickname
                  - username
                  - title
                  - media_type
                  - cost
                  - remain_money
              examples:
                '1':
                  summary: 成功
                  value:
                    code: 0
                    nickname: 外卖小华哥
                    username: >-
                      v2_060000231003b20faec8c7e48f18c0d6c607e433b07790e7865a95be5604cd719afb0139c5b5@finder
                    title: 朋友们，这样算不算做了一件好事#外卖小哥#日常#生活不易#正能量
                    media_type: 4
                    cost: 0.2
                    remain_money: 2579.26
                '2':
                  summary: 视频无法播放
                  value:
                    code: -2
                    msg: '视频无法播放,原因: 此内容暂时无法播放'
                    data: {}
                    cost: 0.2
                    remain_money: 29663.244
                '3':
                  summary: 视频设置隐私
                  value:
                    code: -2
                    msg: '视频无法播放,原因: 此内容暂时无法播放'
                    data: {}
                    cost: 0.2
                    remain_money: 29663.244
          headers: {}
          x-apifox-name: 成功
      security: []
      x-apifox-folder: 视频号接口
      x-apifox-status: released
      x-run-in-apifox: https://app.apifox.com/web/project/4919579/apis/api-460453061-run
components:
  schemas: {}
  securitySchemes: {}
servers:
  - url: https://www.dajiala.com
    description: 正式环境
security: []

```
